name: plot_chart
description: Render a chart (bar, line, scatter, histogram, etc.) from tabular data with configurable aggregation and grouping.

params.description: Render a chart (bar, line, scatter, histogram, etc.) from tabular data with configurable aggregation and grouping.

rows.description: List of dict rows from the dataset

columns.description: List of column names in the dataset

x.description: Column name for x-axis or grouping variable

y.description: Column name for y-axis or metric to aggregate

series.description: Optional column name for multi-series (different colors/lines)

image_base64.description: Base64-encoded PNG image of the chart

rows_plotted.description: Number of rows included in the chart after cleaning

steps: Extract rows, columns, and chart configuration from args
Parse numeric values defensively (remove currency symbols, commas, units)
Remove rows with missing values in key columns
Aggregate y-column by x-column using specified function (mean/sum/count/etc.)
Handle multi-series grouping if series_col is provided
Render chart using matplotlib with appropriate kind (bar/line/scatter/histogram)
Apply title, axis labels, and formatting
Save figure to PNG, base64-encode, and return
